ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "source_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source account */,
  "destination_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination account */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money transferred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transaction */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the transaction */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the transaction */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1=Monday, 7=Sunday) */,
  "is_fraud" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is fraudulent */,
  "transaction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Brief description or note about the transaction */,
  "is_suspicious" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is suspicious */,
  "suspicion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for marking the transaction as suspicious */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_destination_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account owner */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "last_transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last transaction */,
  "account_opening_balance" REAL /* Initial balance when the account was opened */,
  "account_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the account based on historical transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "account_type_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for account types */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud case */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the fraud case */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator handling the case */,
  "case_open_date" TEXT /* Date the case was opened */,
  "case_close_date" TEXT /* Date the case was closed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments related to the case */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the fraud case */,
  "case_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the fraud case */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fraud case */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence collected during the investigation */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the case resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_cases_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_cases_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the investigator */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in fraud investigation */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the investigator */,
  "last_case_assigned" TEXT /* Date of the last case assigned to the investigator */,
  "cases_handled" INTEGER /* Number of cases handled by the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)
